name: mcp-rapidid
description: MCP server for RapidIdentity — search users, manage entitlements, query groups, and read audit logs via the RapidIdentity API.

tools.name: search-users
tools.description: Used to search basic RapidIdentity user information based on a simple criteria

tools.name: search-entitlements-for-user
tools.description: Used to search entitlements for a RapidIdentity user

tools.name: start-entitlement-request
tools.description: Starts entitlement requests for any number of users

tools.name: get-my-delegations
tools.description: Returns the delegations accessible to the authenticated user

tools.name: get-user-info-in-delegation
tools.description: Returns user profile information for users in a specific RapidIdentity delegation

tools.name: search-groups
tools.description: Searches for RapidIdentity groups matching the given criteria

tools.name: get-group-members
tools.description: Returns the members of a specific RapidIdentity group

tools.name: get-user-activity-from-audit-log
tools.description: Returns audit log activity for a specific RapidIdentity user over a given date range

tools.name: get-connect-actions
tools.description: Returns Connect action sets within a project, or across all projects

tools.name: get-connect-action
tools.description: Returns a single RapidIdentity Connect action set by ID

tools.name: save-connect-action
tools.description: Saves (creates or updates) a RapidIdentity Connect action set

tools.name: delete-connect-action
tools.description: Deletes a RapidIdentity Connect action set by ID

ri_host.title: RapidIdentity Host
ri_host.description: Hostname of your RapidIdentity instance, e.g. portal.us006-rapididentity.com. Do not include https://.

ri_user.title: Username
ri_user.description: RapidIdentity username for user/password authentication. Leave blank when using a service identity.

ri_password.title: Password
ri_password.description: RapidIdentity password for user/password authentication. Leave blank when using a service identity.

ri_service_identity_secret_key.title: Service Identity Secret Key
ri_service_identity_secret_key.description: Service identity secret key. Takes precedence over username/password when set.
